title: pinus durangensis subsp. quinquefoliata
intro: Pinus durangensis subsp. quinquefoliata is a subspecies of pine tree native to Mexico, characterized by its five-needle leaves and unique growth habits. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Pinus durangensis subsp. quinquefoliata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as extracts and infusions, are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
